title: The Crowded Hour
writer: Channing Pollock, John Russell, Edgar Selwyn
actors: Bebe Daniels, Kenneth Harlan, T. Roy Barnes
plot: Telephone operator Peggy, puts on an act with Matt Wilde at a Bowery amateur night and is seen by Billy Laidlaw, who becomes convinced of her talents. Billy subsequently arranges for the Broadway debut of the act and falls in love...
